title: helianthemum italicum
intro: Helianthemum italicum, also known as Rockrose or Italian Rose, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum italicum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its flowers can also be used in herbal remedies and as a natural dye.
